heading: Reduced cost-sharing for individuals enrolling in qualified health plans
label: 18071 Reduced cost-sharing for individuals enrolling in qualified health plans

children.text: the Secretary shall notify the issuer of the plan of such eligibility; and
the issuer shall reduce the cost-sharing under the plan at the level and in the manner specified in subsection (c).
who enrolls in a qualified health plan in the silver level of coverage in the individual market offered through an Exchange; and
whose household income exceeds 100 percent but does not exceed 400 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved.

children.heading: Determination of reduction in cost-sharing
children.label: c Determination of reduction in cost-sharing
i
children.text: an eligible insured whose household income is more than 100 percent but not more than 200 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, by two-thirds;

children.label: ii
children.text: an eligible insured whose household income is more than 200 percent but not more than 300 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, by one-half; and

children.label: iii
children.text: an eligible insured whose household income is more than 300 percent but not more than 400 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, by one-third.

children.heading: Coordination with actuarial value limits
children.label: B Coordination with actuarial value limits
I
children.text: 94 percent in the case of an eligible insured described in paragraph (2)(A);

children.label: II
children.text: 87 percent in the case of an eligible insured described in paragraph (2)(B);

children.label: III
children.text: 73 percent in the case of an eligible insured whose household income is more than 200 percent but not more than 250 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved; and

children.label: IV
children.text: 70 percent in the case of an eligible insured whose household income is more than 250 percent but not more than 400 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved.

children.heading: Adjustment
children.label: ii Adjustment
children.text: The Secretary shall adjust the out-of pocket limits under paragraph (1) if necessary to ensure that such limits do not cause the respective actuarial values to exceed the levels specified in clause (i).1

children.heading: Additional reduction for lower income insureds
children.label: 2 Additional reduction for lower income insureds
A
children.text: in the case of an eligible insured whose household income is not less than 100 percent but not more than 150 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, increase the plan’s share of the total allowed costs of benefits provided under the plan to 94 percent of such costs;

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an eligible insured whose household income is more than 150 percent but not more than 200 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, increase the plan’s share of the total allowed costs of benefits provided under the plan to 87 percent of such costs; and

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of an eligible insured whose household income is more than 200 percent but not more than 250 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved, increase the plan’s share of the total allowed costs of benefits provided under the plan to 73 percent of such costs.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: An issuer of a qualified health plan making reductions under this subsection shall notify the Secretary of such reductions and the Secretary shall make periodic and timely payments to the issuer equal to the value of the reductions.

children.heading: Capitated payments
children.label: B Capitated payments
children.text: The Secretary may establish a capitated payment system to carry out the payment of cost-sharing reductions under this section. Any such system shall take into account the value of the reductions and make appropriate risk adjustments to such payments.

children.heading: Additional benefits
children.label: 4 Additional benefits
children.text: If a qualified health plan under offers benefits in addition to the essential health benefits required to be provided by the plan, or a State requires a qualified health plan under to cover benefits in addition to the essential health benefits required to be provided by the plan, the reductions in cost-sharing under this section shall not apply to such additional benefits.section 18022(b)(5) of this titlesection 18031(d)(3)(B) of this title

children.heading: Special rule for pediatric dental plans
children.label: 5 Special rule for pediatric dental plans
children.text: If an individual enrolls in both a qualified health plan and a plan described in section 18031(d)(2)(B)(ii)(I) of this title for any plan year, subsection (a) shall not apply to that portion of any reduction in cost-sharing under subsection (c) that (under regulations prescribed by the Secretary) is properly allocable to pediatric dental benefits which are included in the essential health benefits required to be provided by a qualified health plan under .2section 18022(b)(1)(J) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “18031(d)(3)(B)(ii)(I)”.2

children.label: A
children.text: such individual shall be treated as an eligible insured; and

children.label: B
children.text: the issuer of the plan shall eliminate any cost-sharing under the plan.

children.heading: Items or services furnished through Indian health providers
children.label: 2 Items or services furnished through Indian health providers
A
children.text: no cost-sharing under the plan shall be imposed under the plan for such item or service; and

children.label: B
children.text: the issuer of the plan shall not reduce the payment to any such entity for such item or service by the amount of any cost-sharing that would be due from the Indian but for subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Payment
children.label: 3 Payment
children.text: The Secretary shall pay to the issuer of a qualified health plan the amount necessary to reflect the increase in actuarial value of the plan required by reason of this subsection.

children.heading: Rules for individuals not lawfully present
children.label: e Rules for individuals not lawfully present
A
children.text: no cost-sharing reduction under this section shall apply with respect to the individual; and

children.label: I
children.text: the taxpayer’s family size is determined by not taking such individuals into account, and

children.label: aa
children.text: the numerator of which is the poverty line for the taxpayer’s family size determined after application of subclause (I), and

children.label: bb
children.text: the denominator of which is the poverty line for the taxpayer’s family size determined without regard to subclause (I).

children.label: ii
children.text: A comparable method reaching the same result as the method under clause (i).

children.heading: Lawfully present
children.label: 2 Lawfully present
children.text: For purposes of this section, an individual shall be treated as lawfully present only if the individual is, and is reasonably expected to be for the entire period of enrollment for which the cost-sharing reduction under this section is being claimed, a citizen or national of the United States or an alien lawfully present in the United States.

children.heading: Secretarial authority
children.label: 3 Secretarial authority
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, shall prescribe rules setting forth the methods by which calculations of family size and household income are made for purposes of this subsection. Such rules shall be designed to ensure that the least burden is placed on individuals enrolling in qualified health plans through an Exchange and taxpayers eligible for the credit allowable under this section.

children.heading: Special rule for individuals who receive unemployment compensation during 2021
children.label: f Special rule for individuals who receive unemployment compensation during 2021

children.text: such individual shall be treated as meeting the requirements of subsection (b)(2), and
for purposes of subsections (c) and (d), there shall not be taken into account any household income of the individual in excess of 133 percent of the poverty line for a family of the size involved.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Any term used in this section which is also used in shall have the meaning given such term by such section.section 36B of title 26

children.heading: Limitations on reduction
children.label: 2 Limitations on reduction
children.text: No cost-sharing reduction shall be allowed under this section with respect to coverage for any month unless the month is a coverage month with respect to which a credit is allowed to the insured (or an applicable taxpayer on behalf of the insured) under section 36B of such title.

children.heading: Data used for eligibility
children.label: 3 Data used for eligibility
children.text: Any determination under this section shall be made on the basis of the taxable year for which the advance determination is made under and not the taxable year for which the credit under is allowed.section 18082 of this titlesection 36B of title 26
